description: A ground-level photograph depicts a wire mesh fence with barbed wire and concrete posts extending diagonally from the left foreground towards the right midground, bordering a still water body. The water surface reflects the sky, which appears overcast or at dusk/dawn. A small blue object, possibly a buoy, floats in the water near the fence on the right side. The far bank of the water body is visible on the right, and the horizon line in the background suggests open land. The bottom left corner of the image contains the text "©European Union, 2012" and "LUCAS".
